    // 1
    public function interviewSchedule($day, $rpid): array
    {
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $iwms = InterviewRecordsMd::alias('ir')
            ->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'ir.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->leftJoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'rp.job_id')
            ->leftJoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->leftJoin('offer_approval as oa', 'rp.id', 'oa.rec_pro_id')
            ->where('ir.interviewer_id', '=', $userId)
            ->where(function ($query) use ($day) {
                $query->where('ir.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->orWhere('ir.interview_time', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")));
            });
        if ($rpid) {
            $iwms->where('ir.rec_pro_id', $rpid);
        }
        $interviewRecords = $iwms
            ->selectRaw("rp.resume_id,rp.filled_reason,rp.status as rec_pro_status, rp.id as rec_pro_id , ir.*, CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name, ifnull(oa.approval_status, '') as approval_status, rp.job_id as rp_job_id")
            ->get()->toArray();

        [$interviewRecords, $tokens] = $this->filterAddToken($interviewRecords);

        $resumeIds = array_column($interviewRecords, 'resume_id');
        $recProIds = array_column($interviewRecords, 'rec_pro_id');
        // 加入以简历为准的, 标为当前的笔试的信息
        $resumeList = ResumeMd::whereIn('id', $resumeIds)->selectRaw('id as resume_id, username, nickname, inputer_user_id, recent_archive_info')
            ->get()->toArray();

        $offerMap = ResumeRecruitmentCacheMd::whereIn('resume_id', $resumeIds)->where('type', 'create_offer')
            ->selectRaw('max(created_at) as created_at, resume_id')->groupBy('resume_id')->get()->keyBy('resume_id')->toArray();
        $entryMap = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', $recProIds)->select(['entry_time', 'rec_pro_id', 'remark'])->get()->keyBy('rec_pro_id')->toArray();

        foreach ($interviewRecords as $k => $v) {
            $interviewRecords[$k]['username'] = '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['inputer_user_id'] = '';
            // 只保留到日期
            $createdAt = $offerMap[$v['resume_id']]['created_at'] ?? '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['createOfferTime'] = $createdAt ? date('Y-m-d', strtotime($createdAt)) : '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['remark'] = $entryMap[$v['rec_pro_id']]['remark'] ?? '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['entry_time'] = $entryMap[$v['rec_pro_id']]['entry_time'] ?? '';
            if ($interviewRecords[$k]['rec_pro_status'] == 'archive') {
                $interviewRecords[$k]['entry_time'] = '';
            }
            foreach ($resumeList as $rv) {
                if ($rv['resume_id'] == $v['resume_id']) {
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['username'] = $rv['username'];
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['nickname'] = $rv['nickname'];
                    $recent_archive_info = $rv['recent_archive_info'];
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['archive_reason'] = $recent_archive_info['reason'] ?? $v['filled_reason'] ?? '';
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['specific_reason'] = $recent_archive_info['remark'] ?? '';
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['inputer_user_id'] = $rv['inputer_user_id'];
                }
            }
        }
        $list = WrittenExamMd::alias('we')->with('FileStorePathInfo')->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'we.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->whereIn('rp.resume_id', $resumeIds)->where('we.is_closed', 0)
            ->where('we.is_current', 1)->selectRaw('we.*, rp.resume_id')->get()->toArray();
        foreach ($interviewRecords as $k => $v) {
            $interviewRecords[$k]['exam_list'] = [];
            foreach ($list as $lv) {
                if ($lv['resume_id'] == $v['resume_id']) {
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['exam_list'][] = $lv;
                }
            }
        }

        return ['interview_records' => $interviewRecords, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function updateInterviewResult(int $id, array $updateInfo): void
    {
        $ir = InterviewRecordsMd::find($id);
        if (!app(RecruitmentProcessService::class)->judgeChangeLogic($ir->rec_pro_id, RecruitmentProcessionMd::REC_STATUS['面试'])) {
            throw new InternalException(__('my_api.not_in_interview_status'), 801);
        }
        if ($ir->interview_result !== '') {
            throw new InternalException(__('my_api.interview_round_has_result'), 802);
        }
        $ir->update($updateInfo);
    }

    public function offerApproval($day, $offer_ids = null)
    {
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $query = ResumeMd::join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'rp.resume_id', 'resumes.id')
            ->join('offer_approval as oa', 'oa.rec_pro_id', 'rp.id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'oa.job_id')
            ->leftjoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->where('oa.approver_id', $userId)
            ->where('oa.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
            ->selectRaw("resumes.*,resumes.id as resume_id,rp.status as rec_pro_status, rp.id as rec_pro_id, oa.id as target_id, CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name,
                oa.approval_status, oa.probation_time, oa.salary, oa.probation_salary, oa.operator_id, oa.intern_salary, oa.remark as oa_remark, oa.approver_id, oa.reject_reason, oa.created_at");

        if (is_array($offer_ids)) {
            $query->whereIn('oa.id', $offer_ids);
        }
        $offers = $query->get()->toArray();

        if (empty($offers)) {
            return ['offers' => [], 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => []]];
        }

        $resumeIds = array_column($offers, 'resume_id');
        $recProIds = array_column($offers, 'rec_pro_id');

        // 最近一次「offer创建」时间
        $offerMap = ResumeRecruitmentCacheMd::whereIn('resume_id', $resumeIds)
            ->where('type', 'create_offer')
            ->selectRaw('max(created_at) as created_at, resume_id')
            ->groupBy('resume_id')
            ->get()
            ->keyBy('resume_id')
            ->toArray();

        // 最近一次入职时间
        $waitingEntryMap = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', $recProIds)
            ->selectRaw('max(entry_time) as entry_time, rec_pro_id')
            ->groupBy('rec_pro_id')
            ->get()
            ->keyBy('rec_pro_id')
            ->toArray();

        foreach ($offers as &$offer) {
            $resumeId = $offer['resume_id'] ?? 0;
            $recProId = $offer['rec_pro_id'] ?? 0;
            $offer['offer_create_time'] = Arr::get($offerMap, "{$resumeId}.created_at", '');
            $offer['entry_time'] = Arr::get($waitingEntryMap, "{$recProId}.entry_time", '');
        }
        unset($offer);

        [$offers, $tokens] = $this->filterTokenBatch($offers);

        return ['offers' => $offers, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function entryArrangement($day)
    {
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $recs = ResumeMd::alias('re')
            ->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 're.id', '=', 'rp.resume_id')
            ->leftJoin('interview_records as ir', 'rp.id', '=', 'ir.rec_pro_id')
            ->join('offer_approval as oa', 'oa.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->join('waiting_entry as we', 'rp.id', '=', 'we.rec_pro_id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'oa.job_id')
            ->leftjoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->where(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('oa.approver_id', $userId)
                    ->where('oa.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->orWhere(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('ir.interviewer_id', '=', $userId)
                    ->where('ir.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->orWhere(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('we.supervisor_id', '=', $userId)
                    ->where('we.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->selectRaw("distinct re.*, re.id as resume_id, rp.id as rec_pro_id , CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name, if (oa.approver_id = '{$userId}' or we.supervisor_id  = '{$userId}' , 1, 0) as is_oa")
            ->orderBy('we.entry_time')
            ->get()->toArray();

        [$recs, $tokens] = $this->filterToken($recs);

        $subquery = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', array_column($recs, 'rec_pro_id'))->groupBy('rec_pro_id')->selectRaw('rec_pro_id,MAX(id) AS max_id');

        $waiting_entry = WaitingEntryMd::alias('we')
            ->joinSub($subquery, 'tmp', 'we.id', '=', 'tmp.max_id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', '=', 'we.job_id')
            ->selectRaw('we.*, b.job_name as entry_job_name')->get()->toArray();

        $waiting_entry = array_column($waiting_entry, null, 'rec_pro_id');
        $users = userInfo();
        foreach ($recs as &$recruitment) {
            $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = $waiting_entry[$recruitment['rec_pro_id']] ?? [];
            if (!$recruitment['is_oa']) {
                $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = Arr::only($recruitment['waiting_entry'], ['rec_pro_id', 'entry_time', 'entry_job_name', 'follow_up_hr_id', 'work_schedule']);
                $recruitment = Arr::except($recruitment, ['nickname']);
            } else {
                $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = Arr::only($recruitment['waiting_entry'], ['rec_pro_id', 'entry_time', 'entry_job_name', 'supervisor_id', 'mentor', 'seat', 'remark', 'follow_up_hr_id', 'work_schedule', 'is_overseas_student', 'is_intern', 'is_part_time', 'work_place', 'work_type', 'is_foreigner', 'is_hmt', 'is_tripartite_agreement_signed', 'is_social_recruitment']);
                $recruitment['waiting_entry']['supervisor'] = Arr::get($users, "{$recruitment['waiting_entry']['supervisor_id']}.nickname", '');
            }
            $recruitment['waiting_entry']['follow_up_hr'] = Arr::get($users, "{$recruitment['waiting_entry']['follow_up_hr_id']}.nickname", '');
        }
        return ['entry_arrangement' => $recs, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function addToken($resumes, $resume_id)
    {
        return array_values(array_filter(array_map(function ($re) use ($resume_id) {
            $re['token'] = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $resume_id ?? $re['resume_id']);
            return $re; // 更新工作年份及年龄
        }, $resumes), function ($re) {
            return $re['token'] !== null;
        }));
    }

    /**
     * 批量查询 token，替代 filterToken 的 N+1 查询
     * 一次性查出当前用户对指定 resume_id 集合的 token，内存中匹配.
     */
    protected function filterTokenBatch(array $recruitments): array
    {
        if (empty($recruitments)) {
            return [[], []];
        }

        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $time = now()->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $resumeIds = array_unique(array_column($recruitments, 'resume_id'));

        // 限定 item 范围：只查包含本次 resume_id 的 token 记录
        $query = AuthorityTokenMd::whereJsonContains('authorized_person', (int)$userId)
            ->whereRaw('expire_time >= TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, created_at, ?)', [$time])
            ->where('type', 'resume')
            ->select('token', 'item')
            ->orderBy('id', 'desc');

        // 按 resume_id 缩小查询范围，避免全表扫描
        $query->where(function ($q) use ($resumeIds) {
            foreach ($resumeIds as $rid) {
                $q->orWhereJsonContains('item', (int)$rid);
            }
        });

        $allTokens = $query->get()->toArray();

        // 构建 resume_id => token 的映射
        $resumeTokenMap = [];
        foreach ($allTokens as $tokenRow) {
            $items = is_array($tokenRow['item']) ? $tokenRow['item'] : json_decode($tokenRow['item'], true);
            if (!is_array($items) || empty($items)) {
                continue;
            }
            foreach ($items as $itemId) {
                $itemId = (int)$itemId;
                if (!isset($resumeTokenMap[$itemId])) {
                    $resumeTokenMap[$itemId] = $tokenRow['token'];
                }
            }
        }

        // 用映射过滤，替代逐条查询
        $tokens = [];
        $filtered = [];
        foreach ($recruitments as $rec) {
            $resumeId = (int)($rec['resume_id'] ?? 0);
            if (isset($resumeTokenMap[$resumeId])) {
                $tokens[] = $resumeTokenMap[$resumeId];
                $filtered[] = $rec;
            }
        }

        return [$filtered, array_values(array_unique($tokens))];
    }

    protected function filterToken($recruitments)
    {
        $tokens = [];
        $newRecs = array_values(array_filter($recruitments, function ($ir) use (&$tokens) {
            $token = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $ir['resume_id']);
            $tokens[] = $token;
            return $token !== null;
        }));

        return [$newRecs, array_values(array_unique(array_filter($tokens)))];
    }

    protected function updateResumeInfo($recruitment)
    {
        $work_seconds = 0;
        foreach ($recruitment['get_resume_experience'] as $value) {
            if ($value['type'] == 'work') {
                if (empty($value['end_time'])) { // 为空表示至今
                    $value['end_time'] = date('Y-m');
                }
                $work_seconds += strtotime(str_replace('.', '-', $value['end_time'] ?? '')) - strtotime(str_replace('.', '-', $value['start_time'] ?? '')); // 添加工作年月
            }
        }
        $recruitment['work_month'] = $this->getYearBySecond((int)$work_seconds);

        return $recruitment;
    }

    /**
     * 根据描述算出年份，向下取整.
     *
     * @param int $seconds
     * @return string
     */
    protected function getYearBySecond(int $seconds)
    {
        $result = __('my_api.none');
        if ($seconds >= 86400 * 365) {
            $year = floor($seconds / (86400 * 365));
            $result = $year.__('my_api.year');
        }
        return $result;
    }

    protected function filterAddToken($recruitments)
    {
        $tokens = [];
        $newRecs = array_values(array_filter(array_map(function ($re) {
            $re['token'] = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $re['resume_id']);
            return $re;
        }, $recruitments), function ($re) use (&$tokens) {
            $tokens[] = $re['token'];
            return $re['token'] !== null;
        }));
        return [$newRecs, array_values(array_unique(array_filter($tokens)))];
    }
}

    public function resumeFilter(array $input)

        // 后面前端要通过名称进行筛选

            ->whereRaw("expire_time >= TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND,created_at,'{$time}')")
            ->where('type', 'resume')
            ->select('item')
            ->orderBy('id', 'desc');

    // 1
    public function interviewSchedule($day, $rpid): array
    {
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $iwms = InterviewRecordsMd::alias('ir')
            ->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'ir.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->leftJoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'rp.job_id')
            ->leftJoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->leftJoin('offer_approval as oa', 'rp.id', 'oa.rec_pro_id')
            ->where('ir.interviewer_id', '=', $userId)
            ->where(function ($query) use ($day) {
                $query->where('ir.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->orWhere('ir.interview_time', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")));
            });
        if ($rpid) {
            $iwms->where('ir.rec_pro_id', $rpid);
        }
        $interviewRecords = $iwms
            ->selectRaw("rp.resume_id,rp.filled_reason,rp.status as rec_pro_status, rp.id as rec_pro_id , ir.*, CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name, ifnull(oa.approval_status, '') as approval_status, rp.job_id as rp_job_id")
            ->get()->toArray();

        [$interviewRecords, $tokens] = $this->filterAddToken($interviewRecords);

        $resumeIds = array_column($interviewRecords, 'resume_id');
        $recProIds = array_column($interviewRecords, 'rec_pro_id');
        // 加入以简历为准的, 标为当前的笔试的信息
        $resumeList = ResumeMd::whereIn('id', $resumeIds)->selectRaw('id as resume_id, username, nickname, inputer_user_id, recent_archive_info')
            ->get()->toArray();

        $offerMap = ResumeRecruitmentCacheMd::whereIn('resume_id', $resumeIds)->where('type', 'create_offer')
            ->selectRaw('max(created_at) as created_at, resume_id')->groupBy('resume_id')->get()->keyBy('resume_id')->toArray();
        $entryMap = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', $recProIds)->select(['entry_time', 'rec_pro_id', 'remark'])->get()->keyBy('rec_pro_id')->toArray();

        foreach ($interviewRecords as $k => $v) {
            $interviewRecords[$k]['username'] = '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['inputer_user_id'] = '';
            // 只保留到日期
            $createdAt = $offerMap[$v['resume_id']]['created_at'] ?? '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['createOfferTime'] = $createdAt ? date('Y-m-d', strtotime($createdAt)) : '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['remark'] = $entryMap[$v['rec_pro_id']]['remark'] ?? '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['entry_time'] = $entryMap[$v['rec_pro_id']]['entry_time'] ?? '';
            if ($interviewRecords[$k]['rec_pro_status'] == 'archive') {
                $interviewRecords[$k]['entry_time'] = '';
            }
            foreach ($resumeList as $rv) {
                if ($rv['resume_id'] == $v['resume_id']) {
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['username'] = $rv['username'];
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['nickname'] = $rv['nickname'];
                    $recent_archive_info = $rv['recent_archive_info'];
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['archive_reason'] = $recent_archive_info['reason'] ?? $v['filled_reason'] ?? '';
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['specific_reason'] = $recent_archive_info['remark'] ?? '';
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['inputer_user_id'] = $rv['inputer_user_id'];
                }
            }
        }
        $list = WrittenExamMd::alias('we')->with('FileStorePathInfo')->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'we.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->whereIn('rp.resume_id', $resumeIds)->where('we.is_closed', 0)
            ->where('we.is_current', 1)->selectRaw('we.*, rp.resume_id')->get()->toArray();
        foreach ($interviewRecords as $k => $v) {
            $interviewRecords[$k]['exam_list'] = [];
            foreach ($list as $lv) {
                if ($lv['resume_id'] == $v['resume_id']) {
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['exam_list'][] = $lv;
                }
            }
        }

        return ['interview_records' => $interviewRecords, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function updateInterviewResult(int $id, array $updateInfo): void
    {
        $ir = InterviewRecordsMd::find($id);
        if (!app(RecruitmentProcessService::class)->judgeChangeLogic($ir->rec_pro_id, RecruitmentProcessionMd::REC_STATUS['面试'])) {
            throw new InternalException(__('my_api.not_in_interview_status'), 801);
        }
        if ($ir->interview_result !== '') {
            throw new InternalException(__('my_api.interview_round_has_result'), 802);
        }
        $ir->update($updateInfo);
    }

    public function offerApproval($day, $offer_ids = null)
    {
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $query = ResumeMd::join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'rp.resume_id', 'resumes.id')
            ->join('offer_approval as oa', 'oa.rec_pro_id', 'rp.id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'oa.job_id')
            ->leftjoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->where('oa.approver_id', $userId)
            ->where('oa.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
            ->selectRaw("resumes.*,resumes.id as resume_id,rp.status as rec_pro_status, rp.id as rec_pro_id, oa.id as target_id, CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name,
                oa.approval_status, oa.probation_time, oa.salary, oa.probation_salary, oa.operator_id, oa.intern_salary, oa.remark as oa_remark, oa.approver_id, oa.reject_reason, oa.created_at");

        if (is_array($offer_ids)) {
            $query->whereIn('oa.id', $offer_ids);
        }
        $offers = $query->get()->toArray();

        if (empty($offers)) {
            return ['offers' => [], 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => []]];
        }

        $resumeIds = array_column($offers, 'resume_id');
        $recProIds = array_column($offers, 'rec_pro_id');

        // 最近一次「offer创建」时间
        $offerMap = ResumeRecruitmentCacheMd::whereIn('resume_id', $resumeIds)
            ->where('type', 'create_offer')
            ->selectRaw('max(created_at) as created_at, resume_id')
            ->groupBy('resume_id')
            ->get()
            ->keyBy('resume_id')
            ->toArray();

        // 最近一次入职时间
        $waitingEntryMap = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', $recProIds)
            ->selectRaw('max(entry_time) as entry_time, rec_pro_id')
            ->groupBy('rec_pro_id')
            ->get()
            ->keyBy('rec_pro_id')
            ->toArray();

        foreach ($offers as &$offer) {
            $resumeId = $offer['resume_id'] ?? 0;
            $recProId = $offer['rec_pro_id'] ?? 0;
            $offer['offer_create_time'] = Arr::get($offerMap, "{$resumeId}.created_at", '');
            $offer['entry_time'] = Arr::get($waitingEntryMap, "{$recProId}.entry_time", '');
        }
        unset($offer);

        [$offers, $tokens] = $this->filterTokenBatch($offers);

        return ['offers' => $offers, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function entryArrangement($day)
    {
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $recs = ResumeMd::alias('re')
            ->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 're.id', '=', 'rp.resume_id')
            ->leftJoin('interview_records as ir', 'rp.id', '=', 'ir.rec_pro_id')
            ->join('offer_approval as oa', 'oa.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->join('waiting_entry as we', 'rp.id', '=', 'we.rec_pro_id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'oa.job_id')
            ->leftjoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->where(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('oa.approver_id', $userId)
                    ->where('oa.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->orWhere(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('ir.interviewer_id', '=', $userId)
                    ->where('ir.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->orWhere(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('we.supervisor_id', '=', $userId)
                    ->where('we.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->selectRaw("distinct re.*, re.id as resume_id, rp.id as rec_pro_id , CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name, if (oa.approver_id = '{$userId}' or we.supervisor_id  = '{$userId}' , 1, 0) as is_oa")
            ->orderBy('we.entry_time')
            ->get()->toArray();

        [$recs, $tokens] = $this->filterTokenBatch($recs);

        $subquery = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', array_column($recs, 'rec_pro_id'))->groupBy('rec_pro_id')->selectRaw('rec_pro_id,MAX(id) AS max_id');

        $waiting_entry = WaitingEntryMd::alias('we')
            ->joinSub($subquery, 'tmp', 'we.id', '=', 'tmp.max_id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', '=', 'we.job_id')
            ->selectRaw('we.*, b.job_name as entry_job_name')->get()->toArray();

        $waiting_entry = array_column($waiting_entry, null, 'rec_pro_id');
        $users = userInfo();
        foreach ($recs as &$recruitment) {
            $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = $waiting_entry[$recruitment['rec_pro_id']] ?? [];
            if (!$recruitment['is_oa']) {
                $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = Arr::only($recruitment['waiting_entry'], ['rec_pro_id', 'entry_time', 'entry_job_name', 'follow_up_hr_id', 'work_schedule']);
                $recruitment = Arr::except($recruitment, ['nickname']);
            } else {
                $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = Arr::only($recruitment['waiting_entry'], ['rec_pro_id', 'entry_time', 'entry_job_name', 'supervisor_id', 'mentor', 'seat', 'remark', 'follow_up_hr_id', 'work_schedule', 'is_overseas_student', 'is_intern', 'is_part_time', 'work_place', 'work_type', 'is_foreigner', 'is_hmt', 'is_tripartite_agreement_signed', 'is_social_recruitment']);
                $recruitment['waiting_entry']['supervisor'] = Arr::get($users, "{$recruitment['waiting_entry']['supervisor_id']}.nickname", '');
            }
            $recruitment['waiting_entry']['follow_up_hr'] = Arr::get($users, "{$recruitment['waiting_entry']['follow_up_hr_id']}.nickname", '');
        }
        return ['entry_arrangement' => $recs, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function addToken($resumes, $resume_id)
    {
        return array_values(array_filter(array_map(function ($re) use ($resume_id) {
            $re['token'] = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $resume_id ?? $re['resume_id']);
            return $re; // 更新工作年份及年龄
        }, $resumes), function ($re) {
            return $re['token'] !== null;
        }));
    }

    /**
     * 批量查询 token，替代 filterToken 的 N+1 查询
     * 一次性查出当前用户对指定 resume_id 集合的 token，内存中匹配.
     */
    protected function filterTokenBatch(array $recruitments): array
    {
        if (empty($recruitments)) {
            return [[], []];
        }

        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $time = now()->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $resumeIds = array_unique(array_column($recruitments, 'resume_id'));

        // 限定 item 范围：只查包含本次 resume_id 的 token 记录
        $query = AuthorityTokenMd::whereJsonContains('authorized_person', (int)$userId)
            ->whereRaw('expire_time >= TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, created_at, ?)', [$time])
            ->where('type', 'resume')
            ->select('token', 'item')
            ->orderBy('id', 'desc');

        // 按 resume_id 缩小查询范围，避免全表扫描
        $query->where(function ($q) use ($resumeIds) {
            foreach ($resumeIds as $rid) {
                $q->orWhereJsonContains('item', (int)$rid);
            }
        });

        $allTokens = $query->get()->toArray();

        // 构建 resume_id => token 的映射
        $resumeTokenMap = [];
        foreach ($allTokens as $tokenRow) {
            $items = is_array($tokenRow['item']) ? $tokenRow['item'] : json_decode($tokenRow['item'], true);
            if (!is_array($items) || empty($items)) {
                continue;
            }
            foreach ($items as $itemId) {
                $itemId = (int)$itemId;
                if (!isset($resumeTokenMap[$itemId])) {
                    $resumeTokenMap[$itemId] = $tokenRow['token'];
                }
            }
        }

        // 用映射过滤，替代逐条查询
        $tokens = [];
        $filtered = [];
        foreach ($recruitments as $rec) {
            $resumeId = (int)($rec['resume_id'] ?? 0);
            if (isset($resumeTokenMap[$resumeId])) {
                $tokens[] = $resumeTokenMap[$resumeId];
                $filtered[] = $rec;
            }
        }

        return [$filtered, array_values(array_unique($tokens))];
    }

    protected function filterToken($recruitments)
    {
        $tokens = [];
        $newRecs = array_values(array_filter($recruitments, function ($ir) use (&$tokens) {
            $token = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $ir['resume_id']);
            $tokens[] = $token;
            return $token !== null;
        }));

        return [$newRecs, array_values(array_unique(array_filter($tokens)))];
    }

    protected function updateResumeInfo($recruitment)
    {
        $work_seconds = 0;
        foreach ($recruitment['get_resume_experience'] as $value) {
            if ($value['type'] == 'work') {
                if (empty($value['end_time'])) { // 为空表示至今
                    $value['end_time'] = date('Y-m');
                }
                $work_seconds += strtotime(str_replace('.', '-', $value['end_time'] ?? '')) - strtotime(str_replace('.', '-', $value['start_time'] ?? '')); // 添加工作年月
            }
        }
        $recruitment['work_month'] = $this->getYearBySecond((int)$work_seconds);

        return $recruitment;
    }

    /**
     * 根据描述算出年份，向下取整.
     *
     * @param int $seconds
     * @return string
     */
    protected function getYearBySecond(int $seconds)
    {
        $result = __('my_api.none');
        if ($seconds >= 86400 * 365) {
            $year = floor($seconds / (86400 * 365));
            $result = $year.__('my_api.year');
        }
        return $result;
    }

    protected function filterAddToken($recruitments)
    {
        $tokens = [];
        $newRecs = array_values(array_filter(array_map(function ($re) {
            $re['token'] = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $re['resume_id']);
            return $re;
        }, $recruitments), function ($re) use (&$tokens) {
            $tokens[] = $re['token'];
            return $re['token'] !== null;
        }));
        return [$newRecs, array_values(array_unique(array_filter($tokens)))];
    }
}

    public function interviewSchedule($day, $rpid): array
    {
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $iwms = InterviewRecordsMd::alias('ir')
            ->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'ir.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->leftJoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'rp.job_id')
            ->leftJoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->leftJoin('offer_approval as oa', 'rp.id', 'oa.rec_pro_id')
            ->where('ir.interviewer_id', '=', $userId)
            ->where(function ($query) use ($day) {
                $query->where('ir.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->orWhere('ir.interview_time', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")));
            });
        if ($rpid) {
            $iwms->where('ir.rec_pro_id', $rpid);
        }
        $interviewRecords = $iwms
            ->selectRaw("rp.resume_id,rp.filled_reason,rp.status as rec_pro_status, rp.id as rec_pro_id , ir.*, CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name, ifnull(oa.approval_status, '') as approval_status, rp.job_id as rp_job_id")
            ->get()->toArray();

        [$interviewRecords, $tokens] = $this->filterAddToken($interviewRecords);

        $resumeIds = array_column($interviewRecords, 'resume_id');
        $recProIds = array_column($interviewRecords, 'rec_pro_id');
        // 加入以简历为准的, 标为当前的笔试的信息
        $resumeList = ResumeMd::whereIn('id', $resumeIds)->selectRaw('id as resume_id, username, nickname, inputer_user_id, recent_archive_info')
            ->get()->toArray();

        $offerMap = ResumeRecruitmentCacheMd::whereIn('resume_id', $resumeIds)->where('type', 'create_offer')
            ->selectRaw('max(created_at) as created_at, resume_id')->groupBy('resume_id')->get()->keyBy('resume_id')->toArray();
        $entryMap = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', $recProIds)->select(['entry_time', 'rec_pro_id', 'remark'])->get()->keyBy('rec_pro_id')->toArray();

        foreach ($interviewRecords as $k => $v) {
            $interviewRecords[$k]['username'] = '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['inputer_user_id'] = '';
            // 只保留到日期
            $createdAt = $offerMap[$v['resume_id']]['created_at'] ?? '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['createOfferTime'] = $createdAt ? date('Y-m-d', strtotime($createdAt)) : '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['remark'] = $entryMap[$v['rec_pro_id']]['remark'] ?? '';
            $interviewRecords[$k]['entry_time'] = $entryMap[$v['rec_pro_id']]['entry_time'] ?? '';
            if ($interviewRecords[$k]['rec_pro_status'] == 'archive') {
                $interviewRecords[$k]['entry_time'] = '';
            }
            foreach ($resumeList as $rv) {
                if ($rv['resume_id'] == $v['resume_id']) {
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['username'] = $rv['username'];
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['nickname'] = $rv['nickname'];
                    $recent_archive_info = $rv['recent_archive_info'];
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['archive_reason'] = $recent_archive_info['reason'] ?? $v['filled_reason'] ?? '';
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['specific_reason'] = $recent_archive_info['remark'] ?? '';
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['inputer_user_id'] = $rv['inputer_user_id'];
                }
            }
        }
        $list = WrittenExamMd::alias('we')->with('FileStorePathInfo')->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'we.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->whereIn('rp.resume_id', $resumeIds)->where('we.is_closed', 0)
            ->where('we.is_current', 1)->selectRaw('we.*, rp.resume_id')->get()->toArray();
        foreach ($interviewRecords as $k => $v) {
            $interviewRecords[$k]['exam_list'] = [];
            foreach ($list as $lv) {
                if ($lv['resume_id'] == $v['resume_id']) {
                    $interviewRecords[$k]['exam_list'][] = $lv;
                }
            }
        }

        return ['interview_records' => $interviewRecords, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function updateInterviewResult(int $id, array $updateInfo): void
    {
        $ir = InterviewRecordsMd::find($id);

            throw new InternalException(__('my_api.not_in_interview_status'), 801);

    public function offerApproval($day, $offer_ids = null)
    {
        $startAll = microtime(true);
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;

        $t0 = microtime(true);
        $query = ResumeMd::join('recruitment_procession as rp', 'rp.resume_id', 'resumes.id')
            ->join('offer_approval as oa', 'oa.rec_pro_id', 'rp.id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'oa.job_id')
            ->leftjoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->where('oa.approver_id', $userId)
            ->where('oa.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
            ->selectRaw("resumes.*,resumes.id as resume_id,rp.status as rec_pro_status, rp.id as rec_pro_id, oa.id as target_id, CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name,
                oa.approval_status, oa.probation_time, oa.salary, oa.probation_salary, oa.operator_id, oa.intern_salary, oa.remark as oa_remark, oa.approver_id, oa.reject_reason, oa.created_at");

        if (is_array($offer_ids)) {
            $query->whereIn('oa.id', $offer_ids);
        }
        $offers = $query->get()->toArray();
        $t1 = microtime(true);

        if (empty($offers)) {
            info("[offerApproval] userId={$userId} 无数据 耗时=" . round(($t1 - $t0) * 1000) . 'ms');
            return ['offers' => [], 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => []]];
        }

        $resumeIds = array_column($offers, 'resume_id');
        $recProIds = array_column($offers, 'rec_pro_id');

        // 最近一次「offer创建」时间
        $t2 = microtime(true);
        $offerMap = ResumeRecruitmentCacheMd::whereIn('resume_id', $resumeIds)
            ->where('type', 'create_offer')
            ->selectRaw('max(created_at) as created_at, resume_id')
            ->groupBy('resume_id')
            ->get()
            ->keyBy('resume_id')
            ->toArray();
        $t3 = microtime(true);

        // 最近一次入职时间
        $waitingEntryMap = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', $recProIds)
            ->selectRaw('max(entry_time) as entry_time, rec_pro_id')
            ->groupBy('rec_pro_id')
            ->get()
            ->keyBy('rec_pro_id')
            ->toArray();
        $t4 = microtime(true);

        foreach ($offers as &$offer) {
            $resumeId = $offer['resume_id'] ?? 0;
            $recProId = $offer['rec_pro_id'] ?? 0;
            $offer['offer_create_time'] = Arr::get($offerMap, "{$resumeId}.created_at", '');
            $offer['entry_time'] = Arr::get($waitingEntryMap, "{$recProId}.entry_time", '');
        }
        unset($offer);

        [$offers, $tokens] = $this->filterTokenBatch($offers);
        $t5 = microtime(true);

        $totalMs = round(($t5 - $startAll) * 1000);
        info("[offerApproval] userId={$userId} count=" . count($offers) . " 主查询=" . round(($t1 - $t0) * 1000) . 'ms offerMap=' . round(($t3 - $t2) * 1000) . 'ms entryMap=' . round(($t4 - $t3) * 1000) . 'ms tokenBatch=' . round(($t5 - $t4) * 1000) . "ms 总耗时={$totalMs}ms");

        return ['offers' => $offers, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function entryArrangement($day)
    {
        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $recs = ResumeMd::alias('re')
            ->join('recruitment_procession as rp', 're.id', '=', 'rp.resume_id')
            ->leftJoin('interview_records as ir', 'rp.id', '=', 'ir.rec_pro_id')
            ->join('offer_approval as oa', 'oa.rec_pro_id', '=', 'rp.id')
            ->join('waiting_entry as we', 'rp.id', '=', 'we.rec_pro_id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', 'oa.job_id')
            ->leftjoin('job_departments as d', 'd.department_id', 'b.department_id')
            ->where(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('oa.approver_id', $userId)
                    ->where('oa.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->orWhere(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('ir.interviewer_id', '=', $userId)
                    ->where('ir.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->orWhere(function ($query) use ($userId, $day) {
                $query->where('we.supervisor_id', '=', $userId)
                    ->where('we.updated_at', '>=', date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("-{$day} day")))
                    ->where('rp.status', 'wait_entry')
                    ->where('oa.approval_status', 'accept_offer');
            })
            ->selectRaw("distinct re.*, re.id as resume_id, rp.id as rec_pro_id , CONCAT(d.department_name,'-',b.job_name) as job_name, if (oa.approver_id = '{$userId}' or we.supervisor_id  = '{$userId}' , 1, 0) as is_oa")
            ->orderBy('we.entry_time')
            ->get()->toArray();

        [$recs, $tokens] = $this->filterTokenBatch($recs);

        $subquery = WaitingEntryMd::whereIn('rec_pro_id', array_column($recs, 'rec_pro_id'))->groupBy('rec_pro_id')->selectRaw('rec_pro_id,MAX(id) AS max_id');

        $waiting_entry = WaitingEntryMd::alias('we')
            ->joinSub($subquery, 'tmp', 'we.id', '=', 'tmp.max_id')
            ->leftjoin('jobs as b', 'b.job_id', '=', 'we.job_id')
            ->selectRaw('we.*, b.job_name as entry_job_name')->get()->toArray();

        $waiting_entry = array_column($waiting_entry, null, 'rec_pro_id');
        $users = userInfo();
        foreach ($recs as &$recruitment) {
            $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = $waiting_entry[$recruitment['rec_pro_id']] ?? [];
            if (!$recruitment['is_oa']) {
                $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = Arr::only($recruitment['waiting_entry'], ['rec_pro_id', 'entry_time', 'entry_job_name', 'follow_up_hr_id', 'work_schedule']);
                $recruitment = Arr::except($recruitment, ['nickname']);
            } else {
                $recruitment['waiting_entry'] = Arr::only($recruitment['waiting_entry'], ['rec_pro_id', 'entry_time', 'entry_job_name', 'supervisor_id', 'mentor', 'seat', 'remark', 'follow_up_hr_id', 'work_schedule', 'is_overseas_student', 'is_intern', 'is_part_time', 'work_place', 'work_type', 'is_foreigner', 'is_hmt', 'is_tripartite_agreement_signed', 'is_social_recruitment']);
                $recruitment['waiting_entry']['supervisor'] = Arr::get($users, "{$recruitment['waiting_entry']['supervisor_id']}.nickname", '');
            }
            $recruitment['waiting_entry']['follow_up_hr'] = Arr::get($users, "{$recruitment['waiting_entry']['follow_up_hr_id']}.nickname", '');
        }
        return ['entry_arrangement' => $recs, 'decrypt_config' => ['tokens' => $tokens]];
    }

    public function addToken($resumes, $resume_id)
    {
        return array_values(array_filter(array_map(function ($re) use ($resume_id) {
            $re['token'] = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $resume_id ?? $re['resume_id']);
            return $re; // 更新工作年份及年龄
        }, $resumes), function ($re) {
            return $re['token'] !== null;
        }));
    }

    /**
     * 批量查询 token，替代 filterToken 的 N+1 查询
     * 一次性查出当前用户对指定 resume_id 集合的 token，内存中匹配.
     */
    protected function filterTokenBatch(array $recruitments): array
    {
        if (empty($recruitments)) {
            return [[], []];
        }

        $userId = AuthRecord::user()->user_id;
        $time = now()->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $resumeIds = array_unique(array_column($recruitments, 'resume_id'));

        // 限定 item 范围：只查包含本次 resume_id 的 token 记录
        $query = AuthorityTokenMd::whereJsonContains('authorized_person', (int)$userId)
            ->whereRaw('expire_time >= TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, created_at, ?)', [$time])
            ->where('type', 'resume')
            ->select('token', 'item')
            ->orderBy('id', 'desc');

        // 按 resume_id 缩小查询范围，避免全表扫描
        $query->where(function ($q) use ($resumeIds) {
            foreach ($resumeIds as $rid) {
                $q->orWhereJsonContains('item', (int)$rid);
            }
        });

        $allTokens = $query->get()->toArray();

        // 构建 resume_id => token 的映射
        $resumeTokenMap = [];
        foreach ($allTokens as $tokenRow) {
            $items = is_array($tokenRow['item']) ? $tokenRow['item'] : json_decode($tokenRow['item'], true);
            if (!is_array($items) || empty($items)) {
                continue;
            }
            foreach ($items as $itemId) {
                $itemId = (int)$itemId;
                if (!isset($resumeTokenMap[$itemId])) {
                    $resumeTokenMap[$itemId] = $tokenRow['token'];
                }
            }
        }

        // 用映射过滤，替代逐条查询
        $tokens = [];
        $filtered = [];
        foreach ($recruitments as $rec) {
            $resumeId = (int)($rec['resume_id'] ?? 0);
            if (isset($resumeTokenMap[$resumeId])) {
                $tokens[] = $resumeTokenMap[$resumeId];
                $filtered[] = $rec;
            }
        }

        return [$filtered, array_values(array_unique($tokens))];
    }

    protected function filterToken($recruitments)
    {
        $tokens = [];
        $newRecs = array_values(array_filter($recruitments, function ($ir) use (&$tokens) {
            $token = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $ir['resume_id']);
            $tokens[] = $token;
            return $token !== null;
        }));

        return [$newRecs, array_values(array_unique(array_filter($tokens)))];
    }

    protected function updateResumeInfo($recruitment)
    {
        $work_seconds = 0;
        foreach ($recruitment['get_resume_experience'] as $value) {
            if ($value['type'] == 'work') {
                if (empty($value['end_time'])) { // 为空表示至今
                    $value['end_time'] = date('Y-m');
                }
                $work_seconds += strtotime(str_replace('.', '-', $value['end_time'] ?? '')) - strtotime(str_replace('.', '-', $value['start_time'] ?? '')); // 添加工作年月
            }
        }
        $recruitment['work_month'] = $this->getYearBySecond((int)$work_seconds);

        return $recruitment;
    }

    /**
     * 根据描述算出年份，向下取整.
     *
     * @param int $seconds
     * @return string
     */
    protected function getYearBySecond(int $seconds)
    {
        $result = __('my_api.none');
        if ($seconds >= 86400 * 365) {
            $year = floor($seconds / (86400 * 365));
            $result = $year.__('my_api.year');
        }
        return $result;
    }

    protected function filterAddToken($recruitments)
    {
        $tokens = [];
        $newRecs = array_values(array_filter(array_map(function ($re) {
            $re['token'] = getAuthorityToken(AuthRecord::user()->user_id, $re['resume_id']);
            return $re;
        }, $recruitments), function ($re) use (&$tokens) {
            $tokens[] = $re['token'];
            return $re['token'] !== null;
        }));
        return [$newRecs, array_values(array_unique(array_filter($tokens)))];
    }
}
